calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Amend Order To Show Cause For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Jun-01-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Petitioner: Jerry Lee Dull present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Jerry Leigh Dahl.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-29-2004 Off Calendar
